3111570.name: Only One Sword
3111570.description: Welcome to the adventure of a sword lost in a dark dungeon! In Only One Sword, you'll embark on an epic journey through dungeons. As our hero, a sword, you'll defeat enemies and massive bosses, collect coins and souls to gain new abilities, and grow stronger with each level. Remember, your master is waiting for you on the surface. You must escape this dungeon stronger than ever!
3111570.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 土耳其语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
